TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Goatmen Raiders Faction.

Translations.Comment: Козлолюдские = goat-human beast-men. Мародёры = raiders/plunderers. The primary faction unit type.
Ибекс (горный козёл) - более яростные воины. Used 'горных козлов' for mountain goats, fitting the elite warrior archetype.
Standard goat-men warriors with savage brutality. Matches the core faction aesthetic.
Ублюдок = mongrel/half-breed. Стая = pack/horde. Conveys chaotic lesser beast-men as a mass unit.
Mongrel troops armed with spears for melee combat.
Мародёров = raiding. Colourful, mobile assault unit fitting the faction's raiding nature.
Дикие = feral/wild. Боевые = war. Psы = hounds. Savage war beasts allied with the faction.
Стрелки = skirmishers/archers. Light, mobile harassment troops.
Standard Russian term. Half-man, half-horse mythological creatures allied with the goatmen.
Standard Russian term. Bull-headed warriors of immense power.
Standard Russian term. Flying monster servants of the beast-men faction.
Дикий = feral/wild. Великан = giant. Untamed behemoth serving the beast-men forces.
Tribal magic user wielding dark rituals and curses. Fills a spellcaster role in the army.
Длиннорог = longhorn. Elite warrior with distinctive impressive horns, marking him as a superior commander.
Mighty minotaur leader and powerful hero unit. Conveys authority and strength befitting a faction champion.
